puzzleDescription: As a Cyber-Engineer, you must convert raw seconds into a readable [HH:MM:SS] format. Use nested math logic to breakdown time into three components.
objective:
1. Create a prompt 'Raw Seconds: ' in the console then an integer value must be input. 
2. Calculate hours (seconds / 3600), remaining minutes ((seconds % 3600) / 60) and remaining seconds (seconds % 60).
3. Print 'System Time: [H]h [M]m [S]s' for the converted time.
hints: 1 Hour = 3600 seconds. Use '/' to get the whole hours.
To get minutes from what's left, use (seconds % 3600) / 60.
To get the final remaining seconds, use (seconds % 60).
Concatenate carefully to match the 'h m s' format.
